message:
Upgrade dependencies across all crates and update conformance tests

- Bump dependency versions across workspace Cargo.toml and all crate
  manifests: fj-cache, fj-conformance, fj-core, fj-dispatch,
  fj-interpreters, fj-ledger, fj-test-utils, fj-trace
- Refresh Cargo.lock with updated dependency tree
- Update e2e_p2c003.rs conformance test for API compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
